info.title: Fenergo Nebula Risk Command
info.description:
**Risk Command API**:


Risk Command API provides endpoints in order to manage and configure all risk related models and their versions.


**Risk Command API provides**:
  • Risk Calculator Scoping Rules Management
  • Risk Configuration Collection and Items Management
  • Risk Models Management
  • Risk Threshold Models Management
  • Risk Scoping Rules Management

post.description:
This method will create a new RiskCalculatorOption model. The new model will initialize with the DTO data.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: ServiceRequest with the RiskCalculatorOptionModelDto to create

500.description: An exception occurred while processing the command

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

post.description:
This method will create a new RiskConfiguration model with a first draft version. The new version will initialize with the DTO data and have the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

post.summary: Create a new Version for an existing RiskConfiguration model
post.description:
This method will create a new RiskConfiguration model version. The new version will initialize with the DTO data. It will be assigned the next available version number, the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Id of the existing model

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: ServiceRequest with the new version data

500.description: An exception occurred while processing the command

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

post.summary: Create a draft from an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model
post.description:
This method will clone the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model and create a new draft with the next version number. The new version will contain all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

202.description: New draft of RiskConfiguration model created successfully

500.description: An exception occurred while processing the command

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

post.summary: Clone an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model to a new model
post.description:
This method will clone the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model and create a new model with a single version. The new version will contain all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

delete.summary: Delete an existing Version of a RiskConfiguration model
delete.description:
This method will Delete the selected version of an existing RiskConfiguration model. If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as Deleted and become unavailable.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Id of the existing model

parameters.name: versionNumber
parameters.description: The version number of the version to submit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

• Creates a new version of an existing scoping rule set.

  • The new version is initialized with the provided data, a default "Draft" status and the author as the only required signee.

post.description:
• Clones the selected version of an existing scoping rule set and creates a new model with a single version.
  • The new version contains all the data of the original selected one, will have the default status of draft and the author as the only required signee.
  • Returns the id of the cloned data group version.


Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: scopingRuleSetId
parameters.description: Scoping rule set Id

parameters.name: versionNumber
parameters.description: Version number to clone

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

requestBody.description: Clone scoping rule set version request

202.description: Success. Scoping rule set version cloned

messages.message: Not Found. Scoping rule set with given id does not exist

400.description: Bad request. The request has missing/invalid values

401.description: User is not authorized to perform this request

messages.message: Access denied. Following permissions are required: Permission1, Permission2

500.description: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

messages.message: Internal server exception. Please, contact your provider.

410.description: Endpoint marked as deprecated was terminated. This response will be present only if the endpoint was marked as deprecated and has reached the sunset date. During the deprecation period, the API will include additional 'sunset' and 'deprecation' headers.

messages.message: This endpoint is obsolete and was terminated on yyyy-MM-dd

post.summary: Create a new Version for an existing ThresholdModel

This method will create a new ThresholdModel version. The new version will initialize with the DTO data. It will be assigned the next available version number, the default status of Draft and the Author as the only required Signee.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

delete.summary: Delete an existing Version of a ThresholdModel
delete.description:
This method will Delete the selected version of an existing ThresholdModel. If the version is the last one, then the version number of it will become the next available one for the model. Otherwise, the version number will be flagged as Deleted and become unavailable.

Required permissions:
Following permissions are required: RiskConfigurationEdit

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Id of the existing model

parameters.name: versionNumber
parameters.description: The version number of the version to submit

parameters.name: X-TENANT-ID
parameters.description: The UiD of the tenant representing organization

version.description: Scoping rule set aggregate version after update

data.description: Response DTO representing updated scoping rule set

effectiveFrom.description: The date that the version takes effect when published

conditions.description: Conditions under which the schema can be used

version.description:
Current version of scoping rule set version aggregate where the changes needs to be applied. This parameter is required
to guarantee consistency and conflicts detection. If it is not provided, it will save new changes
on top of latest without conflicts checking
